option.value:
import Link from 'next/link'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; export default async function HomePage() { let session = null; try { const { auth } = await import('@/lib/auth/auth'); session = await auth(); } catch (e) { session = null; } const arabicLetters = ['ك', 'ت', 'ب', 'ع', 'ل', 'غ', 'ف', 'ق', 'ث', 'ذ']; const features = [ { icon: '️', title: 'Multiple Dialects', description: 'Egyptian, Gulf, Levantine, and Modern Standard Arabic', letter: 'ع', }, { icon: '', title: 'Various Tones', description: 'Professional, Funny, Urgent, and Emotional', letter: 'ث', }, { icon: '', title: 'Multiple Formats', description: 'Captions, Ads, WhatsApp, and Product Descriptions', letter: 'ك', }, { icon: '', title: 'Team Collaboration', description: 'Invite team members and manage permissions', letter: 'ت', }, { icon: '✅', title: 'Client Approval', description: 'Share for approval and collect feedback', letter: 'ب', }, { icon: '', title: 'Flexible Billing', description: 'Pay-as-you-go or monthly plans', letter: 'ل', }, ]; return (
